title: Initiative Sequencing Launch Brief
description: Build a practical initiative sequencing launch brief artifact that strengthens how strategy is run.
whyItMatters: Projects make strategy tangible. This one forces you to turn theory into a reusable asset that another operator could follow.
prerequisites: Complete at least one related module and identify a real business context.

steps.title: Frame the problem
steps.description: Write down the business problem, why it matters now, and what a better outcome would look like.

steps.title: Gather signal
steps.description: Collect the current data, notes, stakeholder input, and operating context needed to make a grounded recommendation.

steps.title: Design the artifact
steps.description: Create the model, brief, template, dashboard, or system draft that addresses the problem.

steps.title: Review and improve
steps.description: Pressure-test the output against stakeholder questions and tighten it into something another person could use.

steps.title: Present the decision
steps.description: Explain the recommendation, tradeoffs, and next actions in a way leadership can act on.

deliverables: Initiative Sequencing Launch Brief working draft

rubric.description: The output is understandable and useful without extra translation.
The recommendation is grounded in real signal, not just opinion.
Another operator could use the artifact to move work forward.
The work acknowledges what is being chosen and what is being deferred.
